option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — no monthly cost objection. Claire volunteered the booking gap as her biggest issue.

linkedin_approach.precondition: IMAP sweep claire@westfieldhair.co.uk from 07:00. If reply found: act on reply, skip LinkedIn permanently.
linkedin_approach.find_profile: Search: Claire [Westfield Hair Beauty Leeds] on LinkedIn. Salons post frequently — post_reference upgrade highly likely. May topics: wedding hair, prom season, bank holiday, spring colour.
linkedin_approach.connection_note_generic: Claire — Westfield Hair & Beauty came up when I was looking at independent salons in Leeds. Noticed something about the online presence worth a quick mention. Connecting in case it's useful.
linkedin_approach.post_reference_upgrade_template: Claire — saw your post about [specific topic]. Westfield Hair & Beauty caught my attention looking at salons in Leeds. Noticed something about the online presence. Connecting in case it's relevant.
linkedin_approach.post_reference_char_count_note: Template with 5-char topic = 196 chars. Adjust topic length carefully. 200 char hard limit.
rules: Zero reference to prior email, call, SSL, booking system, or website audit
Do NOT send a message at connection — wait for acceptance
DO NOT reference the call booked 2026-04-07
linkedin_approach.first_message_after_acceptance: Claire — noticed the Westfield Hair & Beauty site doesn't have an online booking option. Happy to share what I spotted if it's useful at all.
linkedin_approach.if_no_connection_in_7_days: Archive as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. No further action.

decision_tree_imap_today.if_reply_found_converted: Log CHANGELOG.md — CAMPAIGN MILESTONE #1 — FIRST REVENUE. Invoice today (Option B £350). Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_today.if_reply_found_still_interested: Respond warmly. Send proposal A/B. Close this week. Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_today.if_reply_found_declined: Mark LOST. Brief polite reply. No further contact. Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_today.if_no_reply: LinkedIn connection note (above). Write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after.

items.upsell_signal: 'Sort the whole thing in one go' — strongest buying signal in the campaign. May is wedding + event season — peak print demand.

decision_tree_imap_today.if_reply_found_deal_alive: Present options A/B/C. Target close Thursday 2026-05-07. May is peak print season — timing is ideal. Skip LinkedIn.
